title: Inflatable Punch Punching Bag Tower Boxing Workout Training Gym Exercise + Pump
description: Inflatable punching tower bag. Great exercise for all the family to use. Improves coordination and reflexes. Made from a strong PVC. Anti-leak water weighted base to give stability. Foot pump included to inflate in minutes. Height - 160cm.
